parsed.generic_mechanism: The stronger chapter develops one governing distinction through evidence, qualification, and action; the weaker repeatedly circles its thesis through new slogans, analogies, and assurances after the underlying argument has stopped advancing.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete statistics, an everyday eating episode, addiction metaphors, and a personal recovery story add texture, but repeated promises, drug comparisons, slogans, and instructions keep relanding the same point and steadily drain momentum.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Two contrasting personal reports sharpen the central distinction, while the movement from reader fatigue to inquiry, roadmap, and first instruction feels purposeful; recurring antitheses and the closing recap slightly overstate ideas that have already landed.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Two contrasting personal reports sharpen the central distinction, while the movement from reader fatigue to inquiry, roadmap, and first instruction feels purposeful; recurring antitheses and the closing recap slightly overstate ideas that have already landed.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: Concrete statistics, an everyday eating episode, addiction metaphors, and a personal recovery story add texture, but repeated promises, drug comparisons, slogans, and instructions keep relanding the same point and steadily drain momentum.
